pages.text: Diseases are sometimes a real challenge to the survival skills of a clan. There is plenty of variety such as Greencough, Whitecough, Broken bones, Fever, and others... You never know what to expect! But you better be prepared.$(br)
pages.title: Diseases

pages.text: $(8)Diseases can be obtained in different ways. Some are even obtained from possessing other conditions, and each of them have their own unique effects. $(br2)To see what diseases or conditions a cat has, use your Whiskers to open their menu. $(br2)To see more detailed what diseases or conditions you have, use '/wce info profile'.$(br)
pages.title: Diseases
